---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that is not working correctly
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include any error messages, console output, or screenshots.

## Environment

- **Browser / runtime:** (e.g. Chrome 122, Firefox 123, Node.js 20.x)
- **OS:** (e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04)
- **Library version:** (e.g. planet-time.js 1.1.0, interplanet-time 0.1.0, or "web app at interplanet.live")
- **Language port:** (if applicable — e.g. Python, Go, Rust)

## Additional context

Any other information that might help — e.g. which planet or timezone was involved, whether the issue is intermittent, or what you were trying to achieve.
